entities.description: the map operator is a component that performs fine grained analysis on individual evidence blocks or sub problems
decompose is a process that generates sub problems which are analyzed by the map operator
the reduce operator is a component that aggregates partial results to construct the final response
the global filter is a mechanism used to generate statistical counts as partial results
evidence blocks are the individual units of content that the map operator analyzes
sub problems are specific issues derived from decompose that are analyzed by the map operator
intermediate insights are the outputs generated by the map operator during its analysis
partial results are the outputs from the map operator that are aggregated by the reduce operator
answers to decomposed sub queries are a type of partial result aggregated by the reduce operator
statistical counts are a type of partial result derived from a global filter and aggregated by the reduce operator
the final response is the constructed output created by the reduce operator
detailed content extraction is a capability handled by the system s separation of map and reduce operators
high level reasoning synthesis is a capability handled by the system s separation of map and reduce operators

relations.description: the map operator analyzes sub problems generated from the decompose process
the reduce operator aggregates the partial results generated by the map operator
the reduce operator aggregates statistical counts derived from the global filter
the map operator performs analysis on individual evidence blocks
the map operator performs analysis on sub problems
the map operator generates intermediate insights as its output
the reduce operator aggregates partial results
the reduce operator aggregates answers to decomposed sub queries
the reduce operator aggregates statistical counts
the reduce operator constructs the final response
the map operator is responsible for detailed content extraction
the reduce operator is responsible for high level reasoning synthesis
